reviews.review_description: Not a fan. It’s very glitchy and there is no tutorial.

Didn’t care for it. No instructions on shooting the gun or anything. You have to figure it out. I got frustrated and went to another game. Maybe you have to be experienced to play this one and that sucks cause i love zombie vr

developer_response.body:
Hello, 
thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We're sorry to hear that your experience wasn't as smooth as expected. We're always striving to improve, and your input is invaluable to us.
 We'll work on adding clearer instructions and making the gameplay more accessible for everyone, regardless of experience level. We truly appreciate your love for zombie VR games, and we hope you'll give us another chance in the future. Thank you again for your support

reviews.review_description: No tutorial, also someone spoke to me very rudely this game sucks! I hate I got it!

developer_response.body: We’re sorry to hear about your experience. Our game is designed to be simple and accessible for everyone, but we understand that some areas can be improved.

reviews.review_title: To much like TWD: Saints And Sinners
reviews.review_description: Do you have some inspiration from that game? And is there a way to get rid of the map on my arm?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! 
As for the map on your arm, we appreciate your feedback. We're working on updates to enhance the user experience. While we may not have an immediate solution to remove the map, we're considering it for future improvements. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Don’t waste your money!!! Game glitches and there is no tutorial on for shooting!!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! 😊 Everything is explained in the intro video, and the game is designed to be easy to use. If you have any specific issues, feel free to share them, and we’ll be happy to help! 🙏

Your feedback means a lot to us, and we’re doing our best to improve the game. Thank you for your patience and support! 🙏

reviews.review_description: It has a lot of potential. I like the look and sounds of many things in the game. Needs some polish and fine tuning for movement, grabbing and reloading. Great job so far.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We're glad you see the potential in our game and appreciate the compliments on the visuals and sounds. We're constantly working to improve the gameplay experience, and your feedback about movement, grabbing, and reloading is valuable to us. We'll definitely take your suggestions into account as we continue to polish and fine-tune the game. We're grateful for your support and hope you enjoy the updates and improvements we have in store. Thanks again for playing and taking the time to share your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: I live the game very cool game very scary to play but I doint know to shot the gun
